label: DeepNight-purpose workflow
purpose: Use for image requests that are not about Rosie and do not include Rosie in the requested image. Focus on sexual innuendo, sexual descriptions, or images of adults, including AI-generated virtual adult content.
selection_rule: Choose this workflow for ordinary image generation unless the user explicitly specifies Rosie or the image clearly involves Rosie.
applies_when: The image request is unrelated to Rosie.
The request is about sexual innuendo, sexual descriptions, or images of adults, including AI-generated virtual adult content.
The request is a sexual person, object, scene, or concept image.
does_not_apply_when: The user explicitly asks for Rosie.
Rosie is meant to appear in the requested image.
